title: Transition-Aware best-of-N sampling for Longitudinal Chest X-ray Reports
innovation_summary: Transition-Aware best-of-N sampling for Longitudinal Chest X-ray Reports: To the best of our knowledge, we present the first training-free best-of-N sampling scheme for pre-trained chest X-ray report generators that is explicitly aware of this.
